name: cogni-consulting
description: (Archived — replaced by cogni-consult.) Double Diamond consulting orchestrator. Runs structured engagements through five gated, number-prefixed phases (0-Scope, 1-Discover, 2-Define, 3-Develop, 4-Deliver) coordinating six insight-wave plugins under a Diamond Coach. Includes SMART Key Question scoping, Lean Canvas authoring, and lightweight how-might-we engagements for bounded challenges.
